trans-unit.source: Failed to create retries directory due to collisions in '{0}' despite re-trying.
trans-unit.target: 다시 시도에도 불구하고 '{0}'의 충돌로 인해 재시도 디렉터리를 만들지 못했습니다.
trans-unit.note: '{0}' is the directory where collisions happen

trans-unit.source: Failure threshold policy is enabled, failed tests will not be restarted.
trans-unit.target: 실패 임계값 정책을 사용하도록 설정했습니다. 실패한 테스트는 다시 시작되지 않습니다.

trans-unit.source: Maximum failed tests threshold is {0} and {1} tests failed
trans-unit.target: 실패한 최대 테스트 임계값이 {0}이고 {1} 테스트가 실패했습니다.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the maximum failed tests threshold. {1} is the failed tests count.

trans-unit.source: Percentage failed threshold is {0}% and {1}% tests failed ({2}/{3})
trans-unit.target: 실패한 임계값 백분율은 {0}%이며 {1}% 테스트에 실패했습니다({2}/{3}).
trans-unit.note: {0} is the maximum failed tests percentage threshold. {1} is the actual failed tests percentage. {2} is the failed tests count. {3} is the total tests count.

trans-unit.source: Retry: moved {0} result file(s) to '{1}'
trans-unit.target: Retry: moved {0} result file(s) to '{1}'
trans-unit.note: {0} is the number of files moved. {1} is the destination result directory.

trans-unit.source: Retry: attempt {0}/{1} failed - {2} failing test(s), retrying
trans-unit.target: Retry: attempt {0}/{1} failed - {2} failing test(s), retrying
trans-unit.note: {0} is the current attempt number. {1} is the total number of attempts. {2} is the number of failing tests in this attempt.

trans-unit.source: The retry extension is not supported on browser platform. Browser-based tests cannot be retried due to platform limitations.
trans-unit.target: 브라우저 플랫폼에서는 재시도 확장이 지원되지 않습니다. 플랫폼 제한으로 인해 브라우저 기반 테스트를 다시 시도 할 수 없습니다.

trans-unit.source: Failed to start process '{0}'
trans-unit.target: 프로세스 '{0}'을(를) 시작하지 못했습니다.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the process file path.

trans-unit.source: Add a delay between retries. The delay is expressed as a time value, e.g. 200, 500ms, 1s, 2.5m, 1h, 1d. Default unit is milliseconds.
trans-unit.target: 재시도 간 지연을 추가합니다. 지연은 시간 값으로 표현됩니다(예: 200, 500ms, 1s, 2.5m, 1h, 1d). 기본 단위는 밀리초입니다.
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--retry-failed-tests-delay"} or time examples {Locked="200"}{Locked="500ms"}{Locked="1s"}{Locked="2.5m"}{Locked="1h"}{Locked="1d"}.

trans-unit.source: Option '--retry-failed-tests-delay' requires a valid time span value that is non-negative and no greater than 2147483647ms (~24.20:31:23.647) (e.g. 200, 500ms, 1s, 2.5m, 1h, 1d)
trans-unit.target: '--retry-failed-tests-delay' 옵션에는 음수가 아니고 2147483647ms(~24.20:31:23.647) 이하인 유효한 시간 범위 값이 필요합니다(예: 200, 500ms, 1s, 2.5m, 1h, 1d).
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--retry-failed-tests-delay"} or time examples {Locked="2147483647ms"}{Locked="200"}{Locked="500ms"}{Locked="1s"}{Locked="2.5m"}{Locked="1h"}{Locked="1d"}.

trans-unit.source: Retry failed tests feature allows to restart test execution upon failure.
trans-unit.target: 실패한 테스트 다시 시도 기능을 사용하면 실패 시 테스트 실행을 다시 시작할 수 있습니다.

trans-unit.source: Retry failed tests
trans-unit.target: 실패한 테스트 다시 시도

trans-unit.source: Disable retry mechanism if the percentage of failed tests is greater than the specified value
trans-unit.target: 실패한 테스트의 비율이 지정된 값보다 큰 경우 다시 시도 메커니즘을 사용하지 않도록 설정
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--retry-failed-tests-max-percentage"}.

trans-unit.source: Option '{0}' expects an integer argument between 0 and 100
trans-unit.target: 옵션 '{0}'에는 0에서 100 사이의 정수 인수가 필요합니다.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the option name.

trans-unit.source: Disable retry mechanism if the number of failed tests is greater than the specified value
trans-unit.target: 실패한 테스트 수가 지정된 값보다 큰 경우 다시 시도 메커니즘을 사용하지 않도록 설정
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--retry-failed-tests-max-tests"}.

trans-unit.source: Retry failed tests feature is not supported in hot reload mode
trans-unit.target: 실패한 테스트 다시 시도 기능은 핫 다시 로드 모드에서 지원되지 않습니다.

trans-unit.source: Retry failed tests feature is not supported in server mode
trans-unit.target: 실패한 테스트 다시 시도 기능은 서버 모드에서 지원되지 않습니다.

trans-unit.source: Retry failed tests the given number of times
trans-unit.target: 지정된 횟수만큼 테스트 다시 시도 실패
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--retry-failed-tests"}.

trans-unit.source: Option '{0}' requires option '{1}' to be specified
trans-unit.target: '{0}' 옵션을(를) 사용하려면 '{1}' 옵션을 지정해야 합니다.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the option name that was specified. {1} is the required option name.

trans-unit.source: Option '{0}' expects a non-negative integer argument
trans-unit.target: 옵션 '{0}'에는 음수가 아닌 정수 인수가 필요합니다.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the option name.

trans-unit.source: Options '{0}' and '{1}' cannot be used together
trans-unit.target: '{0}' 및 '{1}' 옵션은 함께 사용할 수 없습니다.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the first option name. {1} is the second option name.

trans-unit.source: duration: {0}
trans-unit.target: duration: {0}
trans-unit.note: {0} is the total retry orchestration duration. Two leading spaces and the lowercase 'duration:' label mirror the platform run summary.

trans-unit.source: Retry summary: Failed! after {0}/{1} attempts
trans-unit.target: Retry summary: Failed! after {0}/{1} attempts
trans-unit.note: {0} is the number of attempts used. {1} is the maximum number of attempts. Keep 'Retry summary:' and 'Failed!' parallel to the platform 'Test run summary: Failed!' wording.

trans-unit.source: failed: {0}
trans-unit.target: failed: {0}
trans-unit.note: {0} is the number of tests still failing after the final attempt. Two leading spaces and the lowercase 'failed:' label mirror the platform run summary.

trans-unit.source: flaky: {0}
trans-unit.target: flaky: {0}
trans-unit.note: {0} is the number of tests that failed at least once but eventually passed. Two leading spaces and the lowercase 'flaky:' label mirror the platform run summary.

trans-unit.source: Retry summary: Passed! after {0}/{1} attempts
trans-unit.target: Retry summary: Passed! after {0}/{1} attempts
trans-unit.note: {0} is the number of attempts used. {1} is the maximum number of attempts. Keep 'Retry summary:' and 'Passed!' parallel to the platform 'Test run summary: Passed!' wording.

trans-unit.source: Retry summary: Passed! on the first attempt (no retries needed)
trans-unit.target: Retry summary: Passed! on the first attempt (no retries needed)
trans-unit.note: Keep 'Retry summary:' and 'Passed!' parallel to the platform 'Test run summary: Passed!' wording.

trans-unit.source: (+{0} retried)
trans-unit.target: (+{0} retried)
trans-unit.note: {0} is the number of test executions that were retried. Appended to the total line, mirroring the platform '(+N retried)' suffix.

trans-unit.source: total: {0}
trans-unit.target: total: {0}
trans-unit.note: {0} is the total number of tests in the suite. Two leading spaces and the lowercase 'total:' label mirror the platform run summary.

trans-unit.source: Retry: waiting {0} before attempt {1}/{2}
trans-unit.target: Retry: waiting {0} before attempt {1}/{2}
trans-unit.note: {0} is the delay (e.g. '1s'). {1} is the next attempt number. {2} is the total number of attempts.

trans-unit.source: Test host process exited before the retry service could connect to it. Exit code: {0}
trans-unit.target: 다시 시도 서비스가 연결되기 전에 테스트 호스트 프로세스가 종료되었습니다. 종료 코드: {0}
trans-unit.note: {0} is the test host process exit code.

trans-unit.source: Test suite failed with and exit code different that 2 (failed tests). Failure related to an unexpected condition. Exit code '{0}'
trans-unit.target: 테스트 도구 모음이 2와 다른 종료 코드를 사용하여 실패했습니다(테스트 실패). 예기치 않은 조건과 관련된 오류입니다. 종료 코드 '{0}'
trans-unit.note: {0} is the exit code.
